text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of Nice Nature's debut race has finally
arrived.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'll probably be talking about "the good ol' days"
by tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Haha, appearing relaxed is my specialty.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Besides, it's not the debut that matters... it's what
comes after it.
choice_data_list:
Just go out there and show off what you've
been working on!

Just go out there and show off what you've
been working on!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I'd more than love to do that if I had
anything worth showing...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But it wouldn't be a Nice Nature race if I didn't
screw up on an important day like this.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm sure I'll do just fine! I guess I'd better be
off.
